:loudspeaker: Have feedback on the report? [Share it here](https://about.codecov.io/codecov-pr-comment-feedback/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=github&utm_content=comment&utm_campaign=pr+comments&utm_term=project-zot).

Thank you for considering to support docker images! This looks very promising!

As described in https://github.com/project-zot/zot/issues/724#issuecomment-1866212829, we are using `imgpkg` to store arbitrary files in a registry. I've built this PR locally and this seems to work now:

It's a bit surprising that the pushed artifact isn't listed in the Zot-UI. Even after pushing the artifact, the UI still shows `No images`. Other than this, this seems to work fine!
Attaching and downloading/verifying cosign-attestations (see https://github.com/project-zot/zot/issues/724#issuecomment-1746634020) works fine:
